hero.name: Ayoub HAMMOU
hero.subtitle: Cybersecurity Consultant (apprenticeship) | IAM • PAM • SOC • GRC • DevSecOps
hero.intro: Passionate about defending systems, managing identities and access, monitoring threats, and building secure, compliant environments. I love turning complex security concepts into practical, real-world solutions.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: Cybersecurity student focused on Identity & Access Management (IAM/PAM), Security Operations (SOC), and Governance, Risk & Compliance (GRC). I build on solid experience as an IT supervisor in a critical banking environment, where I handled hundreds of real-time alerts and managed incidents 24/7.
about.p2: I enjoy building labs, automating workflows, and analyzing security data to strengthen organizations. I am now developing cross-domain expertise through hands-on projects in DevSecOps, Cloud Security, hardening, and pentesting.

contact.intro: Available for an apprenticeship from September 2026 and open to SOC / IAM / DevSecOps internships. Based in Paris (Île-de-France). Feel free to reach out.
